label: Factor Breakdown
description: Per-strategy P&L breakdown for the selected factor with a mini time series chart alongside.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [pnl]. 0.4 ✓ No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ No direct lib/mocks imports. 0.6 FIXED — added Skeleton import and isLoading early-return skeleton (header + 8 factor row placeholders). 0.7 ✓ Two-state empty: no selectedFactor → FactorSummaryTable (shows all factors with click-to-drill); selectedFactor but no data unreachable (selectedFactorData derives from pnlComponents). 0.8 ✓ Error handled at PnLDataProvider level. 0.9 ✓ No dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ selectedFactorData from usePnLData(); FactorSummaryTable uses pnlComponents from usePnLData(). 1.2 ✓ Context reads useGlobalScope(). 1.3 ✓ selectedOrgIds from global scope drives pnlComponents generation. 1.4 ✓ selectedClientIds cascade wired in context. 1.5 ✓ selectedStrategyIds drives generateStrategyBreakdown() and generateFactorTimeSeries(). 1.6 ✓ Empty arrays → filterMultiplier=1 → full unfiltered dataset. 1.7 ✓ STRATEGY_AREA_COLORS is an inline constant (hardcoded in widget, no mock source); formatNumber/formatPercent from lib/utils/formatters.

findings: L0 — 0.6 FAILED (no isLoading handling). Fixed: added Skeleton import and isLoading early-return guard showing header + 8 row skeletons. 8 of 9 checks already passed.

L1 — All 7 checks passed. Both the summary table (FactorSummaryTable) and the drilldown view use data exclusively from usePnLData(). Strategy breakdown and time series are scoped through selectedStrategyIds derived from global scope.
